-------------

The heavy oak doors creaked open, and in strode Luciana Lyndon, a high-ranking knight of the Magic Council. Her presence was commanding.

Unlike the previous investigators sent by the Council, she carried no weapon, no scrolls of inquiry, no air of suspicion. Instead, her hands were empty, her posture rigid yet deliberate. Her stoic expression betrayed no emotion, her sharp features as unyielding as the steel she often wielded.
